items.title: French-owned ship passes through Strait of Hormuz
items.dek: It appears to be the first ship owned by a major European firm to go through the strait since the conflict began.
items.body: It appears to be the first ship owned by a major European firm to go through the strait since the conflict began.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Rapper Gucci Mane kidnapped and robbed by fellow artist, prosecutors say
items.dek: Officials say the hip-hop star was forced to sign papers releasing a rapper known as Pooh Shiesty from his record contract.
items.body: Officials say the hip-hop star was forced to sign papers releasing a rapper known as Pooh Shiesty from his record contract.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US deports eight people 'of African origin' to Uganda
items.dek: The Uganda Law Society criticises the deportation, saying it was illegal and "dehumanising".
items.body: The Uganda Law Society criticises the deportation, saying it was illegal and "dehumanising".
items.author: IriLine Desk
